body:
## Summary
- Keep About-the-test seen-marker writes effect-scoped with `useEffect` instead of render-time `useSettingsStore.getState()` writes.
- Suppress the first-run About modal on `/onboarding` as well as the existing blocking routes.
- Extend `--focus-about-the-test-route-copy` with seen-effect, first-run modal suppression, and Swedish `mockprov`/`mock-provet` route/modal copy guards.
- Add a negative fixture proving `Mock-provet` in `app/about-the-test.tsx` fails the focused guard.

## Verification
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' node scripts/validate-content.js --focus-about-the-test-route-copy`
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' node --test tests/content-onboarding-route-header-parity.test.js --test-name-pattern "about-the-test|first-run about|mockprov|mock-provet|Mock-provet|övningsprov|övningsprovet|UHR"`
- `npm run typecheck -- --pretty false`
- `git diff --check`

Known unrelated local failure:
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' node --test tests/content-legal-route-header-parity.test.js --test-name-pattern "about-the-test|mockprov|mock-provet|Mock-provet|övningsprov|övningsprovet|UHR"` still selects `legal, source, and support routes stay on shared accessible header path` and fails on an existing Support route `LegalSection` body-prop expectation, not on the About-the-test copy/seen-effect changes.
title: copy: guard Swedish about-test mock wording
